stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Spurs take a 3-2 series lea...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the Wolves-Spurs series.

stories.title: Wemby's bounce-back fuels rout; Spurs lead 3-2
stories.summary: Two days removed from his first career ejection, Victor Wembanyama had 27 points, 17 rebounds and three blocks to fuel a Game 5 rout, putting the Spurs one win away from the Western Conference finals.

stories.title: Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke dies at age 29
stories.summary: Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke has died at age 29.

stories.title: Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies at 47...
stories.summary: Jason Collins, the NBA's first openly gay player who has served as a global ambassador for the sport for the past decade, has died of brain cancer, his family said Tuesday. He was 47.

stories.title: Raleigh showers in full uniform, then snaps skid
stories.summary: Cal Raleigh's hitless streak was the longest in the majors this season, and his knock in the seventh inning was his first since April 27.
